steps.title: Step 1: Start Transaction
steps.content: Begin a transaction using START TRANSACTION.

steps.title: Step 2: Execute DML
steps.content: Perform updates simulating a bank transfer.

steps.title: Step 3: Rollback
steps.content: Simulate an error and issue a ROLLBACK to see Atomicity in action.

steps.title: Step 4: Commit
steps.content: Repeat the operations and issue a COMMIT to finalize them.

expectedOutcomes: Understanding of how to bundle operations into an atomic transaction.
